scripts.dev: npm run sources && npm run clean:evidence && concurrently -k -n evidence,sync "EVIDENCE_DATA_DIR=.evidence/template/static/data EVIDENCE_DATA_URL_PREFIX=static/data evidence dev --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5175" "npm run watch:data"
scripts.build: npm run sources && npm run clean:evidence && EVIDENCE_BUILD_DIR=.evidence/template/build EVIDENCE_DATA_DIR=.evidence/template/static/data EVIDENCE_DATA_URL_PREFIX=static/data evidence build
scripts.sources: npm run prepare:plugins && npm run patch:sidebar && npm run patch:layout && npm run sync:data
